phase1_desc: Build analyst mindset and master the most fundamental tool before moving to SQL.
phase2_desc: From basic queries to multi-table analysis — the #1 skill recruiters check.
phase3_desc: Make data speak — dashboards that non-technical stakeholders understand.
phase4_desc: Automation, end-to-end portfolio project, and competency exam preparation.

sessions.01_title: Data Analyst Mindset + Business Process Understanding
sessions.01_output: Understand the analyst's role in an organization, data workflow (source to insight), data types, and how to identify the right business questions.
sessions.02_title: Excel for Data Analysis — Basic to Intermediate
sessions.02_output: Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, INDEX-MATCH, conditional formatting, data validation, handling missing data in Excel.
sessions.03_title: Data Cleaning in Excel + Basic Statistics
sessions.03_output: Identify and fix dirty data, duplicates, inconsistencies; descriptive statistics (mean, median, std dev), data distributions, outlier detection.
sessions.04_output: SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, GROUP BY, HAVING, aggregate functions (SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX), simple analysis from a real database.
sessions.05_output: INNER/LEFT/RIGHT JOIN, subqueries, WITH clause (CTE), combining multiple tables to answer complex business questions.
sessions.06_title: SQL Window Functions + Business Case Analysis
sessions.06_output: ROW_NUMBER(), RANK(), LAG()/LEAD(), NTILE() for ranking, trend, and period comparison analysis. Real case practice: sales and customer behavior analysis.
sessions.07_output: Correct chart principles (when to use bar vs line vs pie), effective colors & layout, building dashboards in Looker Studio from Google Sheets/BigQuery.
sessions.08_title: Power BI — Data Model, DAX, and Professional Dashboard
sessions.08_output: Import data, data model & relationships, DAX basics (CALCULATE, SUMX, DATEADD), publish to Power BI Service, presentation-ready dashboards.
sessions.09_output: Structure of a good analysis report, narrative from data to recommendations, stakeholder presentation simulation, methodology and assumptions documentation.
sessions.10_title: Python for Data Analysts — Pandas, EDA, and Automation
sessions.10_output: Python setup (Google Colab), Pandas (read/filter/groupby/merge), Matplotlib & Seaborn for visualization, automating Excel reports with openpyxl.
sessions.11_output: Complete portfolio project: from data collection, cleaning (Python/Excel), SQL analysis, to final dashboard (Power BI/Looker Studio) + business report with recommendations.
sessions.12_title: Data Ethics & Security + BNSP Competency Simulation
sessions.12_output: Indonesian PDP Law, data privacy principles, data use ethics. Full BNSP competency exam simulation: practical demonstration, written test, and assessor interview.
